subtitle: Return from weekend; Marie on leave; James returns 18 June
context: You're back after the weekend. Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-12 June. James Salas Guillen returns Thursday 18 June from leave starting Friday 5 June. Multiple systems projects are active (HRIS Dashboard, DSE/Cardinus, IM Principles URL changes, College Staff in PXD).

urgent.title: H&S Handover items - action required
urgent.sub: James Salas Guillen has sent handover document with outstanding items. Key issues include DSE/Cardinus data upload, Cority integration, and contractor record management. James on leave until 18 June.
urgent.subject: H&S Handover

urgent.title: HRIS Dashboard workflow failures
urgent.sub: Multiple GitHub workflow failures since 4 June (6 runs failed across different commits). Dashboard updates not completing. Needs immediate investigation.
urgent.subject: [begb0037admin/hris-dashboard] Run failed: Update HRIS Dashboard - main

needs.title: IM Principles URL migration deadline
needs.sub: Old page goes down 23-24 June. Laura Porter confirmed new URL live. You sent reply confirming you can update links in PXD. Follow up with Laura to confirm completion status.
needs.subject: IM Principles - change to URL

needs.title: Halo ER Case Management - approval review schedule
needs.sub: Approval confirmation received from Viktoriia. Natasha Heaton's product owner still off sick. Need to reschedule review meeting for when role is covered.
